name: Breakfast Pocket Pitas
recipeInstructions:
Preheat toaster to 350°F. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients until blended. Fill each pocket with 1/4 cup of mixture. Wrap each pocket individually in foil and heat for 12-15 minutes until hot.
Each serving: 1 Fat, 1 Protein, 1/2 Carb, 1/2 Fiber, 25 optional calories
Per serving: 192
